name: RA2/YR Map Validator (Line-Based Fix)
description: Validate and auto-repair RA2/YR maps using line-based pattern matching. Checks 9 categories: Basic section, map dimensions, waypoints, object coordinates, building overlaps, trigger integrity, AI team references, house integrity, and terrain data.

inputs.label: Map Path
inputs.help: A single .yrm/.map file or a folder containing map files to validate and fix

inputs.label: Recursive Scan
inputs.help: Recursively scan subfolders for map files

inputs.label: Quiet Mode
inputs.help: Only output summary, suppress per-file details
